title: Mount the container for Copy
body: In Copy(), instead of flagging a container not being mounted as an error, do what we do in Run(), which is to mount it first and then unmount when we're done.

comments.body: Should we be checking if it is already mounted?  We don't want to umount it if someone else has done a buildah mount?

The storage library keeps refcounts of mounts using information that it keeps under the `--runroot` directory, so we shouldn't have to worry about accidentally unmounting a container that someone else is using, even if the filesystem doesn't look busy.
